description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a flat, gabled roof. The exterior is predominantly white with large vertical and horizontal windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. There are multiple entry points, including a main door and sliding glass doors that open onto green lawn areas. The house is surrounded by patches of grass and a mature tree, adding a touch of nature to the urban setting. The structure appears to be single-story with an open courtyard or garden area visible from above. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on simplicity and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat gabled roof, large windows, and minimalist white exterior, surrounded by green lawns and a tree.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main door, large windows, and a tree to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting tall vertical windows and a green lawn area.
description_view_2: Rear view with sliding glass doors, a secondary entry, and a visible courtyard garden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring more windows and the tree adjacent to the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large vertical and horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch, flush to the facade, and sliding glass doors at the rear
